prompt: Toggle True Tone. System Settings > Displays > True Tone. Fast path: `cerebellum 'settings open com.apple.preference.displays'` then click the toggle. Note: True Tone is only available on True-Tone-capable Macs (most Apple Silicon and recent Intel models). The eval inspects corebrightnessdiag output or soft-passes if Displays pane is open (True Tone state is hard to read directly).
